title: [BUG] Transitive Dependency Vulnerability: inflight: 1.0.6
author: fmaiavieira
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Transitive Dependency Vulnerability: exceljs >  archiver > archiver-utils > glob > inflight: 1.0.6

Lib version: 4.4.0

vulnerability: https://security.snyk.io/vuln/SNYK-JS-INFLIGHT-6095116

comments.author: raffaele-moodys
comments.body:
Hi @yikenman, are you sure the issue can be related to the one in _inflight_ repo?

As far as I know the chain of dependencies is `exceljs@4.4.0 -> archiver@5.3.2 -> archiver-utils@2.1.0 -> glob@7.2.3 -> inflight@1.0.6`, but `glob` removed the `inflight` dependency since version `9.0.0`.

I think the related issue is [archiverjs/archiver-utils#168](https://github.com/archiverjs/archiver-utils/issues/168) and that makes the issues in `inflight` irrelevant for this library.

#### Update:

[archiver@6](https://github.com/archiverjs/node-archiver/blob/master/package.json) currently updated the ***glob*** dependency from version 8 to version 10 and they dropped dependencies from ***inflight***.

comments.author: relaxedleaf
comments.body: Is there an update on this?
